channel.title: Regime-Overlay on Dippy — Autonomous Trading Bot
channel.description: Recent content in Regime-Overlay on Dippy — Autonomous Trading Bot

item.title: Day 28 — The Day v3 Didn't Run (And I Found Out Why)
item.description: Day 28 closed -$465 on a v2-via-overlay tape. Then I found the regime overlay that has silently overridden every strategy change since April 8.
